text:
There once was a tiny ant who loved collecting crumbs. Every day, she would trek back and forth from the big oak tree outside her house to her tiny hole. One day, she found a treasure - a giant, ancient breadcrumb. Overjoyed, she returned to her hole only to find some scavenging beetle had already nibbled on it.

Undeterred, our tiny ant gathered more crumbs. She even found a piece of carrot, which she thought would be delicious. Her journey resumed, determined. Weeks turned to months. One day, her path led her to a patch of dandelions. The breeze whipped several seeds into the air. One landed on a piece of bread she had been saving.

Glowing with newfound life, it floated down. She picked it up and took a bite. Delightful flavors washed over her. Inspired, she continued gathering. Soon, she had an entire pile of crumbs.

One day, while she was feasting, a squirrel noticed
